title: Risk Classification - Create Daily Calculation Process
body_markdown:
### **Today's Process**

* All Configurations are in Azure PAAS DD RiskClassification on storageapiprd.database.windows.net
* Calculation happened weekly on etoroDB for all customers. Customer is user who is depositor or has a Wallet Account.
* The result of calculation updates `BackOffice.Customer.RiskClassificationID` (the final score) and saved in temporary table in etoro DB (score for each parameter + final score).
* DE Job - step 1 - runs to bring this table to RiskClassification DB and execute SP on this DB - `dbo.P_RiskClassification` to update existsing users and insert new ones to final view.
* DE Job - step 2 - runs to bring the final view - `dbo.V_RiskClassificationDataLake` to DataLake.

### **List of Parameters**

| ID | Name | Source | Source Of Daily Change |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 2 | Country of Residence, Onboarding | `Customer.CustomerStatic` | `History.Customer` |
| 3 | Country of Residence, Existing clients | `Customer.CustomerStatic` | `History.Customer` |
| 4 | Place of Birth | `Customer.CustomerStatic` | Only for new users or Regulation Change |
| 5 | Age of customer | `Customer.CustomerStatic` | `Customer.CustomerStatic` |
| 7 | Screening Status | Screening DB | Screening DB |
| 8 | Main Source of Income | `V_CustomerAnswersNrml` | `History.CustomerAnswer` |
| 9 | Occupation | `V_CustomerAnswersNrml` | `History.CustomerAnswer` |
| 10 | Special Score | `V_CustomerAnswersNrml` | `History.CustomerAnswer` |
| 11 | Annual Income | `V_CustomerAnswersNrml` | `History.CustomerAnswer` |
| 12 | Total Cash And Liquid Assets | `V_CustomerAnswersNrml` | `History.CustomerAnswer` |
| 13 | Money plan To invest | `V_CustomerAnswersNrml` | `History.CustomerAnswer` |
| 14 | High Risk | `V_CustomerAnswersNrml` | `History.CustomerAnswer` |
| 15 | Sector ML TF | `V_CustomerAnswersNrml` | `History.CustomerAnswer` |
| 16 | Sector High Cash | `V_CustomerAnswersNrml` | `History.CustomerAnswer` |
| 17 | Net Deposit | `BackOffice.CustomerAllTimeAggregatedData` | `BackOffice.CustomerAllTimeAggregatedData` |
| 18 | Instruments Planned Investment | `V_CustomerAnswersNrml` | `History.CustomerAnswer` |
| 20 | ScoreExpectedOriginFunds | `Customer.ExtendedUserField` |  |
| 21 | ScoreExpectedDestinationPayments | `Customer.ExtendedUserField` |  |
| 1018 | NFTF | Default by Regulation | Only for new users or Regulation Change |
